message:
fuzz: expand seed corpus for better fuzzing coverage

Add diverse seed inputs covering all data types and edge cases:

RDB decoder (3 → 14 files):
- All value types: string, list, set, hash, zset, stream
- Entries with expiry timestamps
- Multi-database entries
- Auxiliary fields (redis-ver, etc.)
- Binary data in keys/values

AOF decoder (5 → 14 files):
- Common commands: INCR, LPUSH, SADD, ZADD, EXPIRE, DEL
- Multi-command sequences
- XADD stream command
- Binary arguments

DUMP/RESTORE (2 → 5 files):
- String, list, hash payload structures

Add generator example for reproducible corpus creation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
